features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Create the packaged installer, conservative templates, installed skill scaffold, and runtime state for AHE.
features.evidence: Verified with `bash -n init.sh`, `python3 -m json.tool feature-list.json`, `python3 -m json.tool .ahe/process_status.json`, `bash bin/ahe doctor`, `bash bin/ahe version`, installer smoke test into `/private/tmp/ahe-smoke.yILXJY`, and direct execution of `tests/test_project_setup.py` assertions via Python stdlib because pytest is not installed in this workspace.

features.name: Chat Command Routing
features.description: Interpret `ahe` chat messages inside Codex and route them to the correct workflow entrypoint.
features.evidence: Updated .codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md with explicit command routing instructions and added tests/test_chat_command_routing.py which passed.

features.name: Init Workflow
features.description: Implement the `ahe init` conversation flow that creates or updates AGENTS.md and the supporting workspace files.
features.evidence: Updated .codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md with detailed instructions for the step-by-step 'ahe init' workflow. Created tests/test_init_workflow.py and verified that all required sections, inputs, and output files are defined and tested successfully.

features.name: Product Workflow
features.description: Implement the `ahe product` workflow that creates or updates docs/PRODUCT.md and synchronizes tracking artifacts.
features.evidence: Expanded `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` with a dedicated `ahe product` workflow covering workspace inspection, one-question-at-a-time product inputs, required `docs/PRODUCT.md` sections, and synchronization of `AGENTS.md`, `PROGRESS.md`, `SESSION-HANDOFF.md`, and `.ahe/process_status.json`. Added `tests/test_product_workflow.py` and verified with `python3 tests/test_product_workflow.py` and `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Check and Resume Workflows
features.description: Implement `ahe check` and `ahe resume` so AHE can validate the workspace and continue unfinished conversations.
features.evidence: Expanded `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` with dedicated `ahe check` and `ahe resume` workflow sections covering validation scope, checklist-style reporting, resume-state inspection, and next-question behavior. Added `tests/test_check_resume_workflows.py` and verified with `python3 tests/test_check_resume_workflows.py` and `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Session Tracking and Handoff
features.description: Keep PROGRESS.md, SESSION-HANDOFF.md, and .ahe/process_status.json in sync with the active AHE workflow.
features.evidence: Expanded `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` with a cross-workflow `Session Tracking and Handoff Sync` section covering when `.ahe/process_status.json`, `PROGRESS.md`, and `SESSION-HANDOFF.md` must be updated together. Added `tests/test_session_tracking_handoff.py` and verified with `python3 tests/test_session_tracking_handoff.py` and `pytest tests/ -x`.

features.name: Clear Workflow
features.description: Add `ahe clear` so AHE backs up `docs/PRODUCT.md` and `AGENTS.md`, then asks for a new goal and new product specification.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` and `docs/PRODUCT.md` with the `ahe clear` routing and workflow contract. Added `tests/test_clear_workflow.py` and verified with direct Python test-module execution because pytest is not installed in this workspace.

features.name: Clarification Prompt Format
features.description: Require AHE to use a three-option clarification prompt when a user response needs clarification or more detail.
features.evidence: Added the Clarification Prompt Rule to `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, documented it in `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and covered the exact prompt format in `tests/test_clarification_prompt.py`.

features.name: Clear Workflow Reset Semantics
features.description: Change `ahe clear` so it backs up the full harness context, asks for a new goal, resets the AGENTS objective, removes the old product spec, and rewrites `docs/PRODUCT.md` recursively until clear.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, `docs/PRODUCT.md`, and `tests/test_clear_workflow.py` to match the new `ahe clear` semantics. The active clear-workflow backup directory was also expanded to include the full requested backup set.

features.name: Global Codex Helper Scripts
features.description: Make `scripts/install.sh` and `scripts/uninstall.sh` operate on the global Codex home under `~/.codex`.
features.evidence: Updated `scripts/install.sh` to install into `${HOME}/.codex` via the packaged installer and `scripts/uninstall.sh` to remove `${HOME}/.codex/skills/ahe`. Added coverage in `tests/test_project_setup.py`.

features.name: Alias Commands and Update Workflow
features.description: Add Codex-facing aliases like `$ahe-init`, `$ahe-product`, and `$ahe-update`, and define `ahe update` for feature-list, progress, and handoff maintenance.
features.evidence: Updated `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md` and `docs/PRODUCT.md` with `$ahe-*` aliases plus the `ahe update` workflow. Added `tests/test_update_workflow.py` and expanded `tests/test_chat_command_routing.py`.

features.name: Reduced AHE Skill Surface
features.description: Reduce AHE to the seven `$ahe-*` commands for init, agent, product, constraints, architecture, update, and clear.
features.evidence: Rewrote `.codex/skills/ahe/SKILL.md`, updated `docs/PRODUCT.md`, replaced the old check/resume expectations, and added command/workflow contract tests for the reduced `$ahe-*` surface.
